category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Scout Suite as a multi-cloud security-auditing tool for security posture assessment: https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite
source_facts.description says ScoutSuite is an open source multi-cloud security-auditing tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name Scout Suite: https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki provides ScoutSuite setup and usage documentation: https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite/wiki
Official README says installation and additional information are in the wiki: https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository title is nccgroup/ScoutSuite and describes the project: https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite
tags_sources: Official README lists AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Alibaba Cloud, OCI, Kubernetes, and DigitalOcean provider support: https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite
